title: galium parisiense f. divaricatum
intro: Galium parisiense f. divaricatum, also known as the Paris St. John's Wort or Divaricating St. John's Wort, is a variant of the Galium parisiense plant, which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations, wounds, and infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium parisiense f. divaricatum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and promote overall skin health.
